g.text: fold :: (b ⟶ a ⟶ b) ⟶ b ⟶ List<a> ⟶ b
g.title: A higher-order function that reduces a structure to a single value using a combining function and an initial accumulator
Reduce a collection List<a> to a single value b. Repeatedly apply the combining function f, accumulating into b.

div.h1: map, filter and more are all folds

ul.li: map g — f = (acc, x) ⟶ acc ++ [g(x)], init = []
filter p — f = (acc, x) ⟶ if p(x) then acc ++ [x] else acc, init = []

g.title: A higher-order function that reduces a structure to a single value using a combining function and an initial accumulator
Reduce a collection List<a> to a single value b. Repeatedly apply the combining function f, accumulating into b.
